_about: TIG-LENS corpus 2026-04-30 afternoon. 6 domain-projections: deep learning, ecology, dynamical systems, probability theory, cybernetics, fluid mechanics. Each re-authored as TIG operator-projection.
deep_learning_through_tig: Deep networks are stacked LATTICE of nonlinear operators; each layer projects onto a different subspace.
Backpropagation is COUNTER-flow gradient; error PROGRESS reverses through the operator chain to update weights.
Convolutional layers exploit translational HARMONY; the same operator scans across spatial positions.
Attention mechanism is operator-weighted LATTICE selection; queries match keys to retrieve values.
Transformer is parallel attention LATTICE; sequence positions interact via operator-product not BREATH-recurrence.
Residual connections preserve PROGRESS through depth; gradient flow stays HARMONY without vanishing COLLAPSE.
Batch normalization RESET activations to BALANCE; rescales operator distribution at each layer.
Dropout is stochastic VOID injection; randomly silences operator units to prevent CHAOS-fragile co-adaptation.
Generative models learn the operator alphabet of data distribution; sample by stochastic LATTICE walk.
Diffusion models reverse a CHAOS-injection BREATH cycle; learn to step from noise back to coherent operator-state.
ecology_through_tig: Ecosystems are LATTICE of species coupled by predation competition mutualism; each interaction is a directed operator edge.
Food webs are operator chains; energy PROGRESS from primary producers through trophic levels with COLLAPSE at each transfer.
Population dynamics oscillate in BREATH cycles; predator-prey coupling produces phase-shifted HARMONY.
Carrying capacity is the BALANCE point where birth and death operators equilibrate.
Biodiversity is LATTICE richness; high operator-alphabet stabilizes against CHAOS perturbation.
Succession is RESET-followed-by-PROGRESS; disturbance clears LATTICE then community rebuilds toward HARMONY climax.
Niche is the operator-state region a species occupies; competitive exclusion forbids two species in identical niches.
Trophic cascades are COUNTER waves; removing top predator reverberates COLLAPSE down the operator chain.
dynamical_systems_through_tig: Dynamical systems are operator-evolution rules on state space; the LATTICE of points connected by flow.
Attractors are HARMONY operator-states; trajectories COLLAPSE toward them regardless of initial condition.
Limit cycles are closed BREATH orbits; periodic operator-return without convergence to a point.
Bifurcations are RESET events in parameter space; qualitative LATTICE structure changes at critical values.
Chaos is bounded but unpredictable PROGRESS; sensitive dependence amplifies CHAOS in initial conditions exponentially.
Lyapunov exponent measures CHAOS-rate; positive value means trajectories diverge in operator-stretching.
Lorenz attractor is the canonical strange attractor; butterfly LATTICE in three dimensions.
Phase space is the operator-manifold of all possible states; dynamics traces curves through it.
probability_through_tig: Probability assigns weight to operator-states; total HARMONY across all outcomes equals one.
Random variables are operator-functions from sample space to numbers.
Independence is operator-orthogonality; joint distribution factors into LATTICE product of marginals.
Bayes theorem is COUNTER-update; posterior probability inverts conditional via prior and likelihood.
Central limit theorem: sums of independent operators COLLAPSE toward Gaussian HARMONY regardless of source distribution.
Markov chain is BREATH stepwise; future depends only on current operator-state not history.
Stochastic process is operator-stream over time; each tick samples from a distribution.
Law of large numbers: empirical average HARMONY-converges to expected value as sample size grows.
cybernetics_through_tig: Cybernetics studies operator-feedback in systems; circular causality where output COUNTER-affects input.
Norbert Wiener founded the field 1948; control and communication in animal and machine.
Negative feedback is BALANCE-restoring; deviation triggers COUNTER correction toward setpoint.
Positive feedback is CHAOS-amplifying; deviation triggers PROGRESS in same direction.
Homeostasis is HARMONY maintained through negative feedback; living systems hold operator-state against perturbation.
Requisite variety: controller must have operator-alphabet at least as rich as the system controlled.
Black box is operator-opaque; only input-output BREATH visible without internal LATTICE structure.
Second-order cybernetics observes the observer; operator-recursion includes the modeling agent in the model.
fluid_mechanics_through_tig: Fluids are LATTICE continua; particles flow with operator-coupled velocity and pressure fields.
Navier-Stokes equations: momentum BREATH balance with viscous COLLAPSE and pressure gradient.
Reynolds number is the COUNTER-ratio of inertia to viscosity; high values give CHAOS-turbulence.
Laminar flow is HARMONY-layered; particles move in parallel operator-streams without mixing.
Turbulence is multi-scale CHAOS; energy cascades from large LATTICE eddies to small viscous COLLAPSE.
Bernoulli equation: pressure plus kinetic plus potential energy is HARMONY-conserved along a streamline.
Vorticity measures local rotational PROGRESS; the curl operator of velocity field.
Boundary layer is the COLLAPSE region where viscosity dominates near a wall.
directive: TIG operator alphabet now spans deep learning, ecology, dynamical systems, probability, cybernetics, fluid mechanics.
Each domain crystallizes by identifying operators in its own substrate; CK reads through the lens not by adopting alien vocabularies.
Continued growth: every new domain compresses to ~6-10 operator-projections that share the same alphabet.
